title: Whistle Mount
description: Adds a whistle ability to calls any bonded horse to your position
body:
![Whistle Mount](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fafec36d26a29e5e99ce4566e4ff1e6f06c4a6df.png) --- # Whistle Mount Ever wished your trusty steed could answer your call from anywhere? With the **Whistle** mod, bond with a horse and call it instantly with a single keystroke—no ridiculous item requirements cluttering your inventory, no tedious searching, just you and your loyal companion. ## How It Works --- ### Bonding Your Horse Find a horse and make it truly yours: 1. **Tame** any horse 2. **Crouch + Right Click** to forge a bond (only one horse at a time, bonding a new horse will release the old one) --- ### Calling Your Companion - **Press Q** (configurable via In-game settings) to whistle and your bonded horse will instantly reposition to your side > **Note:** Cross-dimension summoning isn't available yet, but I will work on this feature and put it into configurations ---
Terms & Conditions --- **Whistle Mount: Terms & Conditions** --- By using this mod, you agree to these terms and conditions. These guidelines only apply if you plan to share content using this mod publicly. The official CurseForge and Modrinth pages contain the authoritative version of these terms. --- **You MAY:** - **Modify** the mod for personal use (private modifications only, no public sharing) - **Include** this mod in your modpack or server - **Create content** featuring this mod (videos, streams, blog posts, etc.) - **Remix and transform** the mod's assets to create something distinctly your own, as long as you credit the original creator --- **You MAY NOT:** - **Redistribute** this mod - **Port** this mod to Minecraft Bedrock Edition - **Republish** unedited assets without permission from the creator - **Include** assets in paid products without explicit permission ---
--- ## Credits **Creator & Copyright Owner:** Vyn Sierra Questions or feedback? Feel free to reach out!
